  • Storage: 15 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Designed for 1080p at low-medium settings. Players can expect ~60 FPS on recommended minimum GPUs.
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 or Windows 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-10700K / AMD Ryzen 7 5800X or better
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3070 / AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT or better
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 15 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Optimized for 1440p at high-ultra settings. On modern high-end hardware (RTX 4070 + i9-12900K), performance averages 165 FPS with a 1% low of 120 FPS and 0.1% low of 57 FPS (~6ms frame times).
